name: Dr. Elena Rodriguez
bio: Pioneer in generative AI models with over 15 years of experience in machine learning research. Led groundbreaking projects in natural language processing.

name: Marcus Chen
bio: Serial entrepreneur who has built three successful tech startups. Expert in quantum computing applications for enterprise solutions.

name: Sarah Williams
bio: Cloud architecture expert specializing in distributed systems. Speaker at 50+ international tech conferences.

name: Dr. James Okonkwo
bio: Former NASA researcher turned venture capitalist. Focuses on bridging academic innovation with commercial applications.

name: Aisha Patel
bio: Product leader with expertise in brain-computer interfaces. Passionate about human-centered design in emerging technologies.

name: Carlos Mendez
bio: Cybersecurity veteran who has protected Fortune 500 companies. Author of 'Zero Trust in the AI Age'.
